name: publisheriq-research
description: Claude Desktop connector for governed PublisherIQ research evidence packs.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to the hosted PublisherIQ Research MCP gateway. Claude can request format-neutral evidence packs, current snapshots, YouTube coverage, market/genre evidence, optional prior-work search, and governed read-only analysis without direct database credentials.

tools.name: get_report_instructions
tools.description: Return optional PublisherIQ writing guidance, confidence rules, and source-use guidance.

tools.name: search_report_archive
tools.description: Search optional indexed prior work when available.

tools.name: build_game_research_pack
tools.description: Build a format-neutral game evidence pack.

tools.name: build_genre_growth_pack
tools.description: Build a genre/tag growth evidence pack.

tools.name: build_youtube_creator_pack
tools.description: Build a per-game YouTube creator coverage pack.

tools.name: build_company_diligence_pack
tools.description: Build a company diligence evidence pack.

tools.name: build_unreleased_opportunity_pack
tools.description: Build an unreleased opportunity evidence pack.

tools.name: build_report_recreation_pack
tools.description: Build an optional prior-work recreation pack when archive metadata is available.

tools.name: get_publisheriq_data_dictionary
tools.description: Return allowed schemas, common tables, ranking defaults, key columns, and safe SQL templates for SQL-backed PublisherIQ questions.

tools.name: query_publisheriq_data
tools.description: Answer arbitrary PublisherIQ data questions with governed read-only SQL. For broad released-game rankings use metrics.apps_page_projection; for Steam tag filters such as indie join legacy.app_steam_tags to legacy.steam_tags.

tools.name: run_readonly_analysis
tools.description: Run governed read-only SQL analysis when role and server-side sandbox settings allow it.

research_mcp_bearer_token.title: PublisherIQ Research MCP Bearer Token
research_mcp_bearer_token.description: Bearer token for the hosted PublisherIQ Research MCP endpoint.
